sites.context: Inside resumeMountClassInstance — if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; }
Inside updateClassInstance (first branch) — if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; }
Inside updateClassInstance (second branch, likely shouldUpdate path) — if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; }

purpose: The Snapshot flag is set on a class component's fiber whenever the component defines getSnapshotBeforeUpdate, so the commit phase knows to call it before DOM mutations.
